name: Mocha Cake with Chocolate Butter Creme
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Sift together the flour, salt and baking powder three times. Set aside. With an electric mixer, beat the egg yolks and 3/4 cup sugar for 5 minutes. Gradually beat in the flour. Beat the egg whites stiff. As they begin to form peaks, beat in the 2 tbsp. sugar. Fold gently into flour mixture. Turn off heat. Place batter into two well greased 8 inch aluminum cake pans. Bake at 350F for 25 minutes. In a small pot, bring orange juice and 2 tbsp. sugar to a boil. Saturate cakes with juice mixture. Let cool and unmold. Use chocolate butter creme recipe to fill between the layers and frost.
CHOCLOLATE BUTTER CREME: Beat egg yolks until pale and foamy. Put water, sugar and cream of tartar in a saucepan; cook to a thick syrupy consistency. Remove from heat and stir in instant coffee. Slowly pour hot (not boiling) syrup over egg yolks, beating constantly; continue beating until thick and lukewarm. Gradually beat in butter and shortening and beat until mixture is completely smooth. Fold in melted chocolate. Beat again.
